body:
We need to enforce random interval globally between all requests to VK API from 3 to 7 seconds (read requests), 6 to 13 second (write requests). So we reduce probability to get hit API limits. And also double check we use timings and intervals from setup of http://github.com/konard/vk-bot by default they were carefully fine tuned not to hit API limits for months. At the moment our app does requests too fast.

Also we need to make sure we don't upload or download avatar. 

Instead we only need to find a way to get correct avatar id, from existing avatar, that way it will be possible to get likes to existing avatar in each new post:
https://github.com/konard/vk-bot/blob/175d2d13218d9e791ae2f3e824a0d24f10319dcb/triggers/send-invitation-posts-for-friends.js#L86

Please use that feature strictly, it is important to find a way to get full avatar string to correctly attach it to the post. This exact line was working perfectly, but I got this manually, and I don't remember how exactly, so we need to make sure it will work for any user, not just mine.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
title: Fixes and improvements
